name: 7 Minutes In Heaven With Loona
description:
"I... have... an.... IDEA!!!!"

-Grug Crood

Pretty cut n' dry concept. You and Loona went to a party put on by your group of mutual friends, and the party eventually turned out into a spin-the-bottle game. So you and Loona had to get stuck together in a closet for 7 minutes.

Kiss her, segg her, or just have a good talk, it's not my concern.

edit: good heavens

edit 2: how did this bot get almost 10k within a week, and how can I do it again
